zh.Lowther, Westmorland, England: 英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德洛福黑
zh.Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德洛福黑 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Lowther於大約1402年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德洛福黑 卡素時，她的父親Sir Robert Lowther35歲，母親Margaret Strickland39歲。她和Sir Thomas Curwen I至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於大約1442年在英國波藍德沃爾金頓享年42歲。

zh-hans.Lowther, Westmorland, England: 英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德洛福黑
zh-hans.Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德洛福黑 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Lowther于大约1402年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德洛福黑 卡素时，她的父亲Sir Robert Lowther35岁，母亲Margaret Strickland39岁。她和Sir Thomas Curwen I至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于大约1442年在英国波藍德沃爾金頓享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lowther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lawther
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lowther   and   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lauder
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Lowther was born about 1402, in Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England, her father, Sir Robert Lowther, was 35 and her mother, Margaret Strickland, was 39. She had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Sir Thomas Curwen I. She died about 1442, in Workington, Cumberland, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Lowther est née environ 1402, à Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Lowther, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Strickland, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Sir Thomas Curwen I. Elle est décédée environ 1442, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Lowther um 1402 in Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Lowther 35 und ihre Mutter Margaret Strickland 39. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas Curwen I mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1442 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Workington, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Lowther è nata il circa 1402 nel Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Lowther, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margaret Strickland, aveva 39 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Sir Thomas Curwen I. Morì circa 1442, nel Workington, Cumberland, England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Lowther, Westmorland, England: イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエル
ja.Workington, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントン
ja.Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England: イギリスウエストモーランドロウスエル カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Anne Lowtherが約1402年にイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエル カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Lowtherは35歳，母Margaret Stricklandは39歳であった。彼女はSir Thomas Curwen Iとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1442年にイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Lowther(이)가 대략 1402년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 로터 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Lowther(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Strickland(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Curwen I(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1442년 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1402–about 1442: tany ho any amin'ny 1402–tany ho any amin'ny 1442

mn.Lowther, Westmorland, England: Lowther, Westmōringaland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Lowther nasceu aproximadamente 1402, em Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Lowther, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Strickland, tinha 39 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Sir Thomas Curwen I. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1442, em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Lowther родилась около 1402 г. в местности лоутир кастл, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Lowther было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Strickland, 39. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Sir Thomas Curwen I. Она умерла около 1442 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

sm.about 1402–about 1442: e tusa o le 1402–e tusa o le 1442

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Lowther nació aproximadamente 1402, en Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Lowther, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Strickland, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Sir Thomas Curwen I. Murió aproximadamente 1442, en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
